## Description

Brief description of the changes and why they were made.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring (non-breaking change which improves code)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔐 Security improvement
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] All existing tests passing
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Testing Evidence

```
Paste test results or evidence of manual testing
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [code style guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-standards)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented complex code sections
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Screenshots (if applicable)

If this change affects the UI or has visual components, add screenshots here.

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Positive performance impact (improvements)
- [ ] Negative performance impact (explain trade-offs)

## Database Changes

- [ ] No database schema changes
- [ ] Database schema changes (describe)
- [ ] Requires migration

## Deployment Notes

Any special deployment instructions or considerations?
